ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for the module. This helps OpenContent sync with DNN module settings.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used for #anchor links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionTitle.helper: Optional. Main heading shown above the payment options.

SectionDescription.helper: Optional. Short supporting text shown below the heading.
SectionDescription.placeholder: Thank you for supporting this work. Choose the method that works best for you.

PaymentOptions.helper: Add one card for each payment method you want to display.

MethodName.helper: The payment method name shown as the card heading.

Subtitle.helper: Short line shown below the payment method name.

QrImage.helper: Upload or choose the QR code image for this payment method.

QrAltText.helper: Describe the QR code for screen readers.
QrAltText.placeholder: QR code for this payment method

DetailRows.helper: Add visible payment details such as name, phone, handle, account label, or other instructions.

Label.helper: Short label shown before the value.

Value.helper: The detail value shown to visitors.

HighlightValue.helper: Check this to visually emphasize this value.

Instructions.helper: Optional short instructions shown at the bottom of the card.
Instructions.placeholder: Open the app, scan the QR code, or search using the details shown here.

ButtonText.helper: Optional button text. Leave blank if this payment method does not have a link.

ButtonUrl.helper: Optional button URL. Leave blank if this payment method does not have a link.

OptionalNote.helper: Optional note shown below all payment cards.
OptionalNote.placeholder: Add a short note about donations, sponsorships, or tax-deductibility here.
